cases.focus: taxonomy, hide_empty, fields, orderby, limit, parse hooks, SQL request, and terms_clauses
include ordering, search SQL, meta query joins, cache key path, and selected query vars
count field request shape and count result path
status/type/post filters, found rows, paging limits, parse hooks, SQL request, and comments_clauses
comment__in ordering, search columns, date query, meta query joins, and selected query vars

candidate_policy.note: The candidate side currently mirrors locked upstream source to establish a stable fixture. A later WPHX-308 slice must replace the candidate mirror with generated original-path PHP before ownership can be upgraded.

comment-query:count.request: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_comments WHERE ( comment_approved = '1' ) AND comment_post_ID = 101 AND comment_type IN ('', 'comment') AND comment_type NOT IN ('note') /*fixture_comments_clauses*/ ORDER BY wp_comments.comment_date_gmt DESC
comment-query:count.last_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_comments WHERE ( comment_approved = '1' ) AND comment_post_ID = 101 AND comment_type IN ('', 'comment') AND comment_type NOT IN ('note') /*fixture_comments_clauses*/ ORDER BY wp_comments.comment_date_gmt DESC

comment-query:include-search-date-meta.request: SELECT wp_comments.comment_ID FROM wp_comments INNER JOIN wp_commentmeta ON ( wp_comments.comment_ID = wp_commentmeta.comment_id ) WHERE ( ( comment_approved = '0' OR comment_approved = '1' ) ) AND wp_comments.comment_ID IN ( 303,301,302 ) AND comment_type NOT IN ('note') AND (comment_author LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_email LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_url LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_IP LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_content LIKE '%Fixture Search%') AND ( ( wp_commentmeta.meta_key = 'fixture_key' AND wp_commentmeta.meta_value = 'fixture_value' ) ) AND ( wp_comments.comment_date_gmt > '2026-01-01 23:59:59' ) /*fixture_comments_clauses*/ GROUP BY wp_comments.comment_ID ORDER BY FIELD( wp_comments.comment_ID, 303,301,302 )

sql_clauses.from: FROM wp_comments INNER JOIN wp_commentmeta ON ( wp_comments.comment_ID = wp_commentmeta.comment_id )

where.search: (comment_author LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_email LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_url LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_IP LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_content LIKE '%Fixture Search%')

comment-query:include-search-date-meta.last_query: SELECT wp_comments.comment_ID FROM wp_comments INNER JOIN wp_commentmeta ON ( wp_comments.comment_ID = wp_commentmeta.comment_id ) WHERE ( ( comment_approved = '0' OR comment_approved = '1' ) ) AND wp_comments.comment_ID IN ( 303,301,302 ) AND comment_type NOT IN ('note') AND (comment_author LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_email LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_url LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_author_IP LIKE '%Fixture Search%' OR comment_content LIKE '%Fixture Search%') AND ( ( wp_commentmeta.meta_key = 'fixture_key' AND wp_commentmeta.meta_value = 'fixture_value' ) ) AND ( wp_comments.comment_date_gmt > '2026-01-01 23:59:59' ) /*fixture_comments_clauses*/ GROUP BY wp_comments.comment_ID ORDER BY FIELD( wp_comments.comment_ID, 303,301,302 )

comment-query:status-type-post.request: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_comments.comment_ID FROM wp_comments WHERE ( comment_approved = '1' OR comment_approved = '0' ) AND comment_post_ID = 101 AND comment_post_ID IN ( 101,102 ) AND comment_type IN ('', 'comment', 'trackback') AND comment_type NOT IN ('note') /*fixture_comments_clauses*/ ORDER BY wp_comments.comment_date_gmt ASC, wp_comments.comment_ID ASC LIMIT 10,10

sql_clauses.orderby: ORDER BY wp_comments.comment_date_gmt ASC, wp_comments.comment_ID ASC

comment-query:status-type-post.last_query: SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_comments.comment_ID FROM wp_comments WHERE ( comment_approved = '1' OR comment_approved = '0' ) AND comment_post_ID = 101 AND comment_post_ID IN ( 101,102 ) AND comment_type IN ('', 'comment', 'trackback') AND comment_type NOT IN ('note') /*fixture_comments_clauses*/ ORDER BY wp_comments.comment_date_gmt ASC, wp_comments.comment_ID ASC LIMIT 10,10

term-query:basic.request: SELECT t.term_id FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy IN ('fixture_topic') /*fixture_terms_clauses*/ ORDER BY t.name DESC

sql_clauses.from: FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id

term-query:basic.last_query: SELECT t.term_id FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy IN ('fixture_topic') /*fixture_terms_clauses*/ ORDER BY t.name DESC

term-query:count.request: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy IN ('fixture_topic') /*fixture_terms_clauses*/

sql_clauses.from: FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id

term-query:count.last_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy IN ('fixture_topic') /*fixture_terms_clauses*/

term-query:include-search-meta.request: SELECT DISTINCT t.term_id FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_termmeta ON ( t.term_id = wp_termmeta.term_id ) INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy IN ('fixture_topic') AND t.term_id IN ( 12,11 ) AND ((t.name LIKE '%Alpha Beta%') OR (t.slug LIKE '%Alpha Beta%')) AND ( ( wp_termmeta.meta_key = 'fixture_key' AND wp_termmeta.meta_value = 'fixture_value' ) ) /*fixture_terms_clauses*/ ORDER BY FIELD( t.term_id, 12,11 ) ASC

sql_clauses.from: FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_termmeta ON ( t.term_id = wp_termmeta.term_id ) INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id

term-query:include-search-meta.last_query: SELECT DISTINCT t.term_id FROM wp_terms AS t INNER JOIN wp_termmeta ON ( t.term_id = wp_termmeta.term_id ) INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy IN ('fixture_topic') AND t.term_id IN ( 12,11 ) AND ((t.name LIKE '%Alpha Beta%') OR (t.slug LIKE '%Alpha Beta%')) AND ( ( wp_termmeta.meta_key = 'fixture_key' AND wp_termmeta.meta_value = 'fixture_value' ) ) /*fixture_terms_clauses*/ ORDER BY FIELD( t.term_id, 12,11 ) ASC

remaining_gaps.detail: Query-state behavior is only proven between upstream mirrors. Generated public PHP and typed Adapter IR are not yet installed.
The fixture captures deterministic request/clause state with empty result sets. Live MySQL/MariaDB SQL/result parity and upstream PHPUnit ratcheting remain future gates.
